allow: Bash(git commit -m "Update API documentation to reflect actual MCP endpoints")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate from SSEServerTransport to StreamableHTTPServerTransport

Breaking changes from SDK 0.4.0 → 1.29.0:
- Replace deprecated SSE transport with modern Streamable HTTP transport
- Remove GET /mcp SSE endpoint and POST /mcp/messages 
- Add single POST /mcp endpoint for Claude connectors
- Add 405 Method Not Allowed for GET/DELETE /mcp
- Update server capabilities declaration for new SDK

✅ Now supports modern MCP Streamable HTTP protocol
✅ POST /mcp returns proper JSON-RPC initialize response
✅ All existing REST endpoints preserved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

)")
